sections.paragraph: ἀτιμία, ας, ἡ [ἄτιμος] ‘experience of lack of esteem’, dishonor, low esteem 1 Cor 11:14; opp. of δόξα 15:43; 2 Cor 6:8; πάϑη ἀτιμίας passions that bring disgrace Ro 1:26; in irony ϰατὰ ἀ. λέγωto my own shame I confess (we were too weak for that) 2 Cor 11:21; of household furnishings that are put to very ordinary use 2 Ti 2:20; cp. the metaphor Ro 9:21.
